candidate_grammar.boundary: All finite data-only prediction interpreters assembled from admitted exact values, registered inputs, generated operations, immutable held states, a declared terminal emission and no host capability.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of input, value, operation, capability, state, termination, trace and extension forms.

excluded_inputs: arbitrary Python or native contributor code
filesystem, network, subprocess, clock, environment, import and foreign-function access
floating, negative, irrational, imaginary and semantic-zero proof values
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 256-form product and sole preserving form.
statement: Within the registered finite prediction grammar, a physical prediction can be target-inaccessible, exact, portable and completely traced in exactly one form: immutable registered Fold inputs pass through a data-only sequence of generated exact operations to one terminal emission, while every ambient host capability and unregistered operation is absent and any violation halts.
title: Capability-closed exact Fold prediction form
